creator: kickitover@riseup.net
text:
Hi,

math/gnuplot requires the build host to have groff installed to build the man pages for the pkg.  Edited build log below:

====>> Building math/gnuplot
build started at Mon May 15 16:50:32 AWST 2017
port directory: /usr/ports/math/gnuplot
building for: FreeBSD direwolf.anarchadelic. 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT amd64
maintained by: glewis@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/math/gnuplot/Makefile 430431 2017-01-03 01:14:55Z glewis $
Poudriere version: 3.1.99.20170322
Host OSVERSION: 1200030
Jail OSVERSION: 1200030
Job Id: 01

---End Environment---

---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for gnuplot-5.0.5_1:
     CAIRO=on: Cairo graphics library support
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     EXAMPLES=on: Build and/or install examples
     GD=on: GD graphics library support
     GRIDBOX=off: Use the gridbox optimization for hidden3d
     PDF=off: PDF document support
     THINSPLINES=off: Enable thin plate splines for grids in dgrid3d
     WX=on: wxWidgets (formerly wxWindows) support
     X11=on: X11 (graphics) support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
---End OPTIONS List---

--CONFIGURE_ARGS--
--with-readline=gnu  --with-kpsexpand  --without-linux-vga  --without-lisp-files  --without-tutorial  --with-bitmap-terminals  --with-gpic  --with-mif  --with-latex  --with-qt=no  ac_cv_prog_KPSEXPAND=/usr/local/bin/kpsexpand  ac_cv_prog_PLAINTEX=/usr/local/bin/tex  ac_cv_prog_LATEX=/usr/local/bin/latex  ac_cv_prog_PDFLATEX=/usr/local/bin/pdflatex --with-cairo --with-gd=/usr/local --disable-h3d-quadtree --enable-h3d-gridbox --without-pdf --disable-thin-splines --with-wx-config=/usr/local/bin/wxgtk2u-2.8-config --x-libraries=/usr/local/lib --x-includes=/usr/local/include --prefix=/usr/local ${_LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS}
--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--

--CONFIGURE_ENV--

--MAKE_ENV--
LUA_MODLIBDIR=/usr/local/lib/lua/5.2  LUA_MODSHAREDIR=/usr/local/share/lua/5.2  LUA_VER=5.2  LUA_INCDIR=/usr/local/include/lua52  LUA_LIBDIR=/usr/local/lib XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/gnuplot/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/gnuplot/work  HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/gnuplot/work TMPDIR="/tmp" NO_PIE=yes MK_DEBUG_FILES=no MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=no SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES WX_CONFIG=/usr/local/bin/wxgtk2u-2.8-config PREFIX=/usr/local  LOCALBASE=/usr/local  LIBDIR="/usr/lib"  CC="cc" CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -march=bdver2  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing"  CPP="cpp" CPPFLAGS="-DLIBICONV_PLUG -I/usr/local/include"  LDFLAGS=" -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector" LIBS=""  CXX="c++" CXXFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -march=bdver2 -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -DLIBICONV_PLUG"  MANPREFIX="/usr/local" BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -m 444"

.deps/demo_plugin_so-demo_plugin.Tpo -c -o demo_plugin_so-demo_plugin.o `test -f 'demo_plugin.c' || echo './'`demo_plugin.c
cc: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-rdynamic' [-Wunused-command-line-argument]
mv -f .deps/demo_plugin_so-demo_plugin.Tpo .deps/demo_plugin_so-demo_plugin.Po
--- demo_plugin.so ---
cc -rdynamic -fPIC -I../../src -O2 -pipe -march=bdver2  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -shared -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector -o demo_plugin.so demo_plugin_so-demo_plugin.o  -lm  -L/usr/local/lib -lz -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lcairo -lpthread -lglib-2.0 -lintl

Making all in LaTeX
--- Gnuplot ---
cp -p ./Gnuplot.app-defaults Gnuplot
./doc2ms ./gnuplot.doc gnuplot.ms "./titlepag.ms"
groff -s -p -t -e -ms -Tlatin1 gnuplot.ms > gnuplot.txt
/bin/sh: groff: not found
*** Error code 127

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/math/gnuplot/work/gnuplot-5.0.5/docs
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/math/gnuplot
====>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for gnuplot-5.0.5_1
build of math/gnuplot ended at Mon May 15 16:52:42 AWST 2017
build time: 00:02:10
!!! build failure encountered !!!

Following diff allows the build to complete:

Index: math/gnuplot/Makefile
===================================================================
--- math/gnuplot/Makefile       (revision 440908)
+++ math/gnuplot/Makefile       (working copy)
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@
 LICENSE_FILE=  ${WRKSRC}/Copyright
 LICENSE_PERMS= dist-mirror pkg-mirror auto-accept

+BUILD_DEPENDS= groff:textproc/groff
 USES=          iconv lua pkgconfig readline
 USE_TEX=       kpathsea
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes


Thanks
